creator: luke.hamburg@gmail.com
text:
Hello

I am wondering about feasibility of adding the newest 0.6.32 version of avahi to FreeBSD ports. Specifically, this fixes the log spam issue where the message "avahi-daemon[PID]: Invalid response packet from host w.x.y.z" is printed repeatedly to the syslog.

That version is just over 1 year old, so I assume it to be "stable" enough at this point.

Thank you kindly

links:
https://github.com/lathiat/avahi/releases/tag/v0.6.32
https://github.com/lathiat/avahi/releases/download/v0.6.32/avahi-0.6.32.tar.gz
